name: Sinister Syringes
description: Notes Hold Shift to switch between modes. Note that the weapon defaults to Sharps mode whenever a new dungeon instance is entered or if unequipped and requipped.
effects: Ability 1: Sharps While Key Held and Shooting: Drain 20 MP/sec and VIT Decrease (-50 VIT) for 1 second Drain 3 HP/shot to fire a deadly needle Ability 2: Stitches Surgical Maneuver: On key press and release, spend 30 MP for Healing on self for 2 seconds While Key Held and Shooting: Drain 10 MP/sec Spend 10 MP/shot to heal 12 HP when below 90% HP
Bleeding on enemies for 3 seconds. (Bleed Damage: 80) Ignores defense of target
